calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Assets Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Ernest Der appeared for the petitioner.
The Court questioned the appearance of the objector. Mr. Der informed the Court that he had spoken to the objector and he suggested that he hire an attorney. The Court granted the petition.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Tony Aguerre Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Order Confirming Assets Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Continued To Oct-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Leonard Gastinell, Lorenzo Gastinell and Kevin Gastinell (Nephews) appearing in Propria Persona.
Leonard Gastinell informed the Court that they are objecting to the will and the Executor. The Court advisesd Mr.Gastinell to seek legal counsel and to file their objections. The Court continued the matter to 10/02/2007.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
